name: deskmate-marketplace
description: Deskmate — the back office for solo recruiters and small staffing shops.

plugins.name: deskmate
plugins.description: Run your whole recruiting desk without an ops team. Contract Guard reviews recruiting contracts and captures the terms; Fee Chaser chases only the placement fees that are genuinely overdue; Job Kit turns a client's req into a polished JD, interview guide + rubric, and offer template — priced against the same terms.
